title: Cash Flow Management
shortSummary: Runway, burn rate, collections, and payment terms. The operating discipline that keeps your business alive.
whyItMatters: Cash is oxygen. Profitable businesses die when they run out of cash. Understanding cash flow is understanding survival.
coreConcepts: Burn rate = monthly expenses minus monthly revenue (when negative = burning cash)
Runway = total cash / monthly burn rate (how many months before you run out)
Collections management = getting paid faster directly extends runway
Payment terms negotiation = paying slower conserves cash
